title: ranunculus subobtusulus
intro: Ranunculus subobtusulus, also known as the blunt-leaved buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus subobtusulus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in homeopathy and folk medicine for its medicinal properties.
